item.title: How many future Hall of Famers are playing in the 2026 WBC?
item.description: From the locks to the long shots to those in between, we count Cooperstown candidates in this year's World Baseball Classic.

item.title: Kiper's top standouts from the NFL combine: 13 prospects who helped their draft stock
item.description: Mel Kiper Jr. picked out 13 players who caught his attention during combine workouts, including Chris Brazzell II and Dani Dennis-Sutton.

item.title: The four NHL teams that need a blockbuster trade before Friday's deadline
item.description: The coming days could seal the fates of these clubs -- one way or another.

item.title: Wyshynski's NHL trade tier rankings: Which big names could bring a Stanley Cup?
item.description: The playoff races have restarted, with many teams seeking to bolster their rosters for a deep run this spring.

item.title: Yamal is eclipsing young Ronaldo, Messi. Are Barça too dependent on him already?
item.description: Lamine Yamal's goal and assist stats are streets ahead of Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo and Kylian Mbappé at the same age. But is he playing too muc...
